title: Rich British Quinoa Pilaf
description: A festive and fluffy quinoa pilaf featuring turmeric powder with a touch of sous-vide to enhance its flavor and texture.
instructions: Rinse the quinoa under cold water.
Combine the rinsed quinoa with water or vegetable broth in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
While the quinoa cooks, warm the garlic, onion, and turmeric powder in a small pan over medium heat until aromatic and slightly golden.
Stir the cooked quinoa into the warm mixture. Add salt and pepper to taste.
If using saffron threads, steep them in hot water for 10 minutes before adding to the pilaf. Stir well.
Mix the paprika into the pilaf just before serving.
